segments.text: Product of the Sumipa, um, development cycle.
Uh, used to be a 2-2-er here.
Now, second best Olimar player in the world and can beat the likes of Acola.
So, um, yeah. Crazy development from both of these guys.

full_text: Product of the Sumipa, um, development cycle. Uh, used to be a 2-2-er here. Now, second best Olimar player in the world and can beat the likes of Acola. So, um, yeah. Crazy development from both of these guys. Oh! No way!
